detectors.description:
StandardToken.sendETHToFee(uint256) (StandardToken.sol#555-559) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _taxWallet.transfer(amount) (StandardToken.sol#557)
detectors.markdown:
[StandardToken.sendETHToFee(uint256)](StandardToken.sol#L555-L559) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in StandardToken.startTrading() (StandardToken.sol#563-579):
	External calls:
	- _pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswap.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswap.WETH()) (StandardToken.sol#569)
	- _uniswap.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (StandardToken.sol#571)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _uniswap.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (StandardToken.sol#571)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _canTrade = true (StandardToken.sol#575)
	StandardToken._canTrade (StandardToken.sol#301) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- StandardToken.endTrading() (StandardToken.sol#583-591)
	- StandardToken.startTrading() (StandardToken.sol#563-579)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in StandardToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (StandardToken.sol#461-505):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (StandardToken.sol#487)
		- _uniswap.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (StandardToken.sol#519-531)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (StandardToken.sol#493)
		- _taxWallet.transfer(amount) (StandardToken.sol#557)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (StandardToken.sol#503)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (StandardToken.sol#629)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (StandardToken.sol#609)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (StandardToken.sol#611)
	StandardToken._rOwned (StandardToken.sol#259) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- StandardToken._takeTeam(uint256) (StandardToken.sol#623-631)
	- StandardToken._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (StandardToken.sol#605-619)
	- StandardToken.balanceOf(address) (StandardToken.sol#377-381)
	- StandardToken.constructor() (StandardToken.sol#319-341)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (StandardToken.sol#503)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (StandardToken.sol#637)
	StandardToken._rTotal (StandardToken.sol#271) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- StandardToken._getCurrentSupply() (StandardToken.sol#725-735)
	- StandardToken._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (StandardToken.sol#635-641)
	- StandardToken.constructor() (StandardToken.sol#319-341)
	- StandardToken.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (StandardToken.sol#435-443)
